violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front area of establishment, is not tight-fitting. PIC has a service ticket in process. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
Observed ice buildup in mini freezer located in back storage area. Establishment shall defrost/deice freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

Both outside dumpsters (cardboard & trash) were observed with a broken cover. PIC has a service ticket in process. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
Hot water is lacking at the hand sink in the back. PIC stated hand sink will be repaired/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
